title: Motorola announces a partnership with GrapheneOS Foundation
summary:
At Mobile World Congress 2026, Motorola announced a strategic long-term partnership with the **GrapheneOS Foundation**, a non-profit known for its hardened, privacy-focused mobile operating system. This collaboration aims to bring advanced security to Motorola’s next-generation smartphones by combining GrapheneOS’s engineering with Motorola’s hardware expertise and Lenovo’s ThinkShield security suite. The two organizations plan to collaborate on joint research and future devices engineered for GrapheneOS compatibility.

Alongside this partnership, Motorola introduced two significant additions to its portfolio:

*   **Moto Analytics:** An enterprise-grade platform designed for IT administrators. Unlike traditional management tools that focus on access control, Moto Analytics provides deep operational insights into fleet performance, including battery health, app stability, and connectivity issues, allowing for proactive troubleshooting.
*   **Private Image Data:** A new feature within the Moto Secure app that automatically strips sensitive metadata—such as GPS location and device specifics—from new photos. This background tool helps users protect their privacy when sharing images without affecting the visual quality of the files.

These announcements highlight Motorola’s continued expansion into the B2B sector and its commitment to integrating high-level security across its consumer and enterprise ecosystems. The new features and collaborative solutions are expected to roll out to signature devices in the coming months.
chinese_title: 摩托罗拉宣布与 GrapheneOS 基金会达成合作。
chinese_summary:
在2026年世界移动通信大会（MWC 2026）上，摩托罗拉宣布与GrapheneOS基金会建立战略性长期合作伙伴关系。该基金会是一家非营利组织，以其安全性加固且专注于隐私的移动操作系统而闻名。此次合作旨在通过结合GrapheneOS的工程技术、摩托罗拉的硬件专业知识以及联想的ThinkShield安全套件，为摩托罗拉下一代智能手机带来先进的安全性。双方计划开展联合研究，并共同开发专为兼容GrapheneOS而设计的未来设备。

除此合作伙伴关系外，摩托罗拉还为其产品组合引入了两项重要补充：

*   **Moto Analytics：** 这是一个专为IT管理员设计的企业级平台。与专注于访问控制的传统管理工具不同，Moto Analytics能够提供关于设备群性能的深度运营洞察，包括电池健康状况、应用稳定性和连接问题，从而实现主动式故障排除。
*   **Private Image Data（私密图像数据）：** 这是Moto Secure应用中的一项新功能，可自动从新照片中剥离敏感元数据，例如GPS位置和设备信息。这一后台工具可帮助用户在分享图片时保护隐私，且不会影响文件的视觉质量。

这些发布凸显了摩托罗拉在B2B领域的持续扩张，以及其在消费者和企业生态系统中整合高级安全性的承诺。相关新功能和协作解决方案预计将在未来几个月内推向标志性设备。

title: New iPad Air, powered by M4
summary:
Apple announced the new iPad Air on March 2, 2026, featuring the powerful **M4 chip** and significantly enhanced memory. Available in 11-inch and 13-inch models, the new tablet offers a 30% performance increase over the M3 model and is 2.3x faster than the M1.

**Key Technical Specifications:**
*   **Performance:** Features an 8-core CPU, 9-core GPU, and a faster 16-core Neural Engine for AI tasks.
*   **Memory:** Unified memory has increased by 50% to **12GB**, with 120GB/s bandwidth.
*   **Connectivity:** Introduces the Apple-designed **N1 chip** (supporting Wi-Fi 7, Bluetooth 6, and Thread) and the **C1X modem** for 50% faster cellular data.
*   **Display/Design:** Available in four finishes (blue, purple, starlight, and space gray) with a landscape 12MP Center Stage camera.

**iPadOS 26 Features:**
The device debuts **iPadOS 26**, which introduces a "Liquid Glass" design language and a new windowing system for improved multitasking. Other software highlights include a dedicated menu bar, a supercharged Files app with folder customization, and a new Preview app for sketching and PDF editing.

**Pricing and Availability:**
Apple maintained the previous generation's starting prices:
*   **11-inch model:** Starts at **$599** ($549 for education).
*   **13-inch model:** Starts at **$799** ($749 for education).
*   **Storage:** Options range from 128GB to 1TB.

The new iPad Air is compatible with Apple Pencil Pro and Magic Keyboard. Pre-orders begin Wednesday, **March 4**, with in-store availability starting Wednesday, **March 11**. Reflecting Apple’s 2030 environmental goals, the device is made with 30% recycled content, including a 100% recycled aluminum enclosure.
chinese_title: 全新 iPad Air，搭载 M4 芯片
chinese_summary:
苹果公司于 2026 年 3 月 2 日发布了新款 iPad Air，搭载强大的 **M4 芯片**并显著提升了内存性能。新款平板电脑提供 11 英寸和 13 英寸两种机型，其性能比 M3 机型提升了 30%，速度比 M1 快 2.3 倍。

**关键技术规格：**
*   **性能：** 配备 8 核中央处理器 (CPU)、9 核图形处理器 (GPU) 以及专为 AI 任务设计的更快的 16 核神经网络引擎。
*   **内存：** 统一内存增加 50% 至 **12GB**，带宽达 120GB/s。
*   **连接性：** 引入苹果设计的 **N1 芯片**（支持 Wi-Fi 7、蓝牙 6 和 Thread）以及 **C1X 调制解调器**，使蜂窝数据速度提升 50%。
*   **显示与设计：** 提供四种配色（蓝色、紫色、星光色和深空灰色），配备横向 1200 万像素支持“人物居中”功能的摄像头。

**iPadOS 26 新功能：**
该设备首发搭载 **iPadOS 26**，引入了“液态玻璃”（Liquid Glass）设计语言和全新的窗口系统以优化多任务处理。其他软件亮点包括专用菜单栏、支持文件夹自定义的增强版“文件”App，以及用于绘图和 PDF 编辑的全新“预览”App。

**价格与上市时间：**
苹果维持了上一代的起售价：
*   **11 英寸机型：** 起售价 **599 美元**（教育优惠价 549 美元）。
*   **13 英寸机型：** 起售价 **799 美元**（教育优惠价 749 美元）。
*   **存储容量：** 提供 128GB 至 1TB 等多种选项。

新款 iPad Air 兼容 Apple Pencil Pro 和妙控键盘。预售将于 **3 月 4 日**（星期三）开始，并于 **3 月 11 日**（星期三）正式发售。为体现苹果 2030 环保目标，该设备采用 30% 的再生材料制造，其中包括 100% 再生铝金属机身。

title: First-ever in-utero stem cell therapy for fetal spina bifida repair is safe
summary:
UC Davis Health researchers have successfully completed Phase 1 of the "CuRe Trial," marking the world’s first in-utero stem cell therapy for repairing spina bifida (myelomeningocele). The results, published in *The Lancet*, confirm that the groundbreaking procedure is safe for both the mother and the fetus.

**The Procedure**
The treatment involves a specialized fetal surgery where surgeons place a patch containing human placenta-derived stem cells directly over the fetus’s exposed spinal cord. This approach aims to go beyond standard surgical repair by using the regenerative power of stem cells to protect the developing spinal cord from further damage and promote tissue healing before birth.

**Key Findings**
The initial phase monitored six infants from surgery through birth. Key results include:
*   **Safety:** There were no infections, spinal fluid leaks, or abnormal tissue growths/tumors.
*   **Surgical Success:** All wounds healed completely, and MRI scans showed a reversal of hindbrain herniation—a primary indicator of surgical success—in all infants.
*   **Reduced Complications:** None of the babies required a shunt for hydrocephalus prior to hospital discharge.

**Significance and Next Steps**
Spina bifida affects nearly 2,000 children in the U.S. annually, often leading to lifelong mobility and cognitive disabilities. While standard fetal surgery has improved outcomes, many children still face significant challenges. This therapy, funded by the California Institute for Regenerative Medicine (CIRM), seeks to further improve quality of life and physical function.

With FDA approval, the trial has moved into Phase 1/2a, enrolling up to 35 patients. Researchers will follow these children until age six to evaluate long-term safety and improvements in motor, bowel, and bladder functions.
chinese_title: 首例用于修复胎儿脊柱裂的宫内干细胞疗法证实安全
chinese_summary:
加州大学戴维斯分校健康中心（UC Davis Health）的研究人员已成功完成“CuRe试验”的第一阶段，这标志着全球首例用于修复脊柱裂（脊髓脊膜膨出）的宫内干细胞疗法取得重大进展。发表在《柳叶刀》上的研究结果证实，这一突破性手术对母亲和胎儿均具有安全性。

**手术过程**
该治疗涉及一项特殊的胎儿手术，外科医生将含有由人类胎盘源性干细胞制成的特殊补片直接覆盖在胎儿暴露的脊髓上。这种方法旨在超越标准的外科修复手术，利用干细胞的再生能力保护发育中的脊髓免受进一步损伤，并在出生前促进组织愈合。

**关键发现**
第一阶段对六名婴儿从手术到出生进行了监测。关键结果包括：
*   **安全性：** 未发现感染、脑脊液泄漏或异常组织生长/肿瘤。
*   **手术成功：** 所有伤口均完全愈合，且核磁共振（MRI）扫描显示，所有婴儿的后脑疝（手术成功的主要指标）均得到逆转。
*   **减少并发症：** 所有婴儿在出院前均无需通过分流术治疗脑积水。

**意义与后续步骤**
美国每年约有2,000名儿童受到脊柱裂的影响，这往往会导致终身的行动能力和认知障碍。虽然标准的胎儿手术已经改善了预后，但许多儿童仍面临巨大挑战。这项由加州再生医学研究所（CIRM）资助的疗法旨在进一步提高患者的生活质量和身体机能。

在获得美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）批准后，该试验已进入1/2a阶段，将招募多达35名患者。研究人员将对这些儿童进行随访直至六岁，以评估其长期安全性以及运动、肠道和膀胱功能的改善情况。

title: /e/OS is a complete, fully “deGoogled” mobile ecosystem
summary:
**/e/OS** is an open-source, privacy-centric mobile ecosystem designed to provide a fully “deGoogled” Android experience. By replacing Google’s core services with privacy-friendly alternatives—such as microG for services and Murena Find for search—the OS ensures that personal data is not harvested by Google. Its privacy standards have been recognized by researchers at the University of Edinburgh and Trinity College Dublin.

**Key Features:**
*   **Privacy & App Management:** While compatible with standard Android apps, /e/OS includes an "App Lounge" that rates apps based on their trackers and permissions. An "Advanced Privacy" widget allows users to block trackers, hide IP addresses, and spoof geolocations.
*   **Murena Workspace:** The ecosystem includes a cloud-based suite (murena.io) providing email, 1GB of free storage, and office tools. This serves as a private alternative to Google Workspace or Office 365, featuring end-to-end encryption for sensitive documents.
*   **User Controls:** The OS features built-in ad blocking, parental controls (content filtering and screen-time limits), and an Account Manager that allows users to sync data from various providers while maintaining local data sovereignty.

**Accessibility:**
Users can obtain /e/OS by purchasing pre-configured **Murena smartphones** or by installing the OS on their own compatible devices using a simplified "Easy Installer" tool. For advanced users, direct downloads and source code are available via GitLab. The project is supported by extensive documentation, a community forum, and a dedicated Telegram support channel.
chinese_title: /e/OS 是一个完整且完全“去谷歌化”的移动生态系统。
chinese_summary:
**/e/OS** 是一个以隐私为核心的开源移动生态系统，旨在提供完全“去谷歌化”的安卓体验。通过使用隐私友好的替代方案（例如用于核心服务的 microG 和用于搜索的 Murena Find）取代谷歌的核心服务，该操作系统确保个人数据不会被谷歌采集。其隐私标准已获得爱丁堡大学和都柏林三一学院研究人员的认可。

**主要特性：**
*   **隐私与应用管理：** /e/OS 在兼容标准安卓应用的同时，内置了“App Lounge”应用商店，可根据追踪器和权限对应用进行安全评分。“高级隐私”组件允许用户屏蔽追踪器、隐藏 IP 地址并伪造地理位置。
*   **Murena 工作空间：** 该生态系统包含一个云端套件 (murena.io)，提供电子邮件、1GB 免费存储空间及办公工具。作为 Google Workspace 或 Office 365 的私密替代方案，它为敏感文档提供端到端加密。
*   **用户控制：** 该系统内置广告拦截、家长控制（内容过滤和屏幕时间限制）以及账号管理器，允许用户在同步各服务商数据的同时，保持本地数据主权。

**获取途径：**
用户可以通过购买预装好的 **Murena 智能手机**，或使用简化的“Easy Installer”工具在自己的兼容设备上安装该系统。对于高级用户，可通过 GitLab 直接下载镜像和源代码。该项目拥有详尽的文档、社区论坛和专门的 Telegram 支持频道。

title: Show HN: Govbase – Follow a bill from source text to news bias to social posts
summary:
**Govbase** is a comprehensive platform designed to provide transparency into the legislative process by tracking bills from their original text to their representation in the media and on social platforms. Introduced as a "Show HN" project, the tool aims to bridge the gap between technical legislative language and public perception.

The platform offers several key features to help users navigate the lifecycle of a bill:

*   **Source Text Tracking:** Users can access the original language of a bill and monitor its progress through the legislative pipeline.
*   **Media Bias Analysis:** Govbase tracks how different news outlets cover specific legislation. By analyzing framing and sentiment, the platform helps users identify media bias and see how the same bill is presented to different audiences across the political spectrum.
*   **Social Media Integration:** The tool monitors social media posts to gauge public reaction and sentiment. This allows users to see which parts of a bill are going viral and how the public discourse aligns with—or diverges from—the actual legislative text.
*   **Data Centralization:** By linking legislative data with news and social metrics, the platform provides a "full-stack" view of political information, making it easier to see how a law evolves from a formal document into a media narrative.

Ultimately, Govbase serves as a transparency tool for journalists, researchers, and citizens. It provides the context necessary to understand not just what a law says, but how it is being marketed, criticized, and discussed in the digital age.
chinese_title: Show HN: Govbase – 追踪法案：从原始文本到新闻偏见再到社交动态
chinese_summary:
**Govbase** 是一个综合性平台，旨在通过追踪法案从原始文本到媒体及社交平台呈现的全过程，提高立法程序的透明度。该工具作为“Show HN”项目推出，旨在弥合专业立法语言与公众认知之间的鸿沟。

该平台提供几个关键功能，帮助用户了解法案的生命周期：

*   **原始文本追踪：** 用户可以查阅法案的原始语言，并监控其在立法流程中的进展。
*   **媒体偏见分析：** Govbase 追踪不同新闻机构对特定立法的报道。通过分析叙事框架和情绪，该平台帮助用户识别媒体偏见，并观察同一法案是如何向不同政治光谱的受众呈现的。
*   **社交媒体整合：** 该工具监控社交媒体帖子以衡量公众反应和情绪。这使用户能够了解法案的哪些部分正在引发热议，以及公众舆论与实际立法文本是趋于一致还是产生偏离。
*   **数据集中化：** 通过将立法数据与新闻及社交指标关联，该平台提供了政治信息的“全栈”视图，使用户更容易观察法律如何从一份正式文件演变为一种媒体叙事。

最终，Govbase 为记者、研究人员和普通公民提供了一个透明化工具。它提供了必要的背景信息，不仅帮助人们理解法律的条文内容，还揭示了法律在数字时代是如何被宣传、抨击和讨论的。

title: Reflex (YC W23) Is Hiring Software Engineers – Python
summary:
Reflex (YC W23), a San Francisco-based startup, is hiring Software Engineers to expand its "operating system" for mission-critical enterprise applications. The company provides a unified, end-to-end platform that combines an open-source framework with integrated infrastructure, allowing teams to build, deploy, and manage applications without specialized DevOps or platform teams.

**Key Roles and Compensation:**
*   **Growth Software Engineer:** $120K–$190K | 0.10%–0.50% equity (New grads ok)
*   **Generalist Software Engineer:** $120K–$180K | 0.10%–0.30% equity (New grads ok)
*   **Lead Infra Software Engineer:** $130K–$200K | 0.15%–0.50% equity (3+ years experience)

**Company Traction and Standing:**
Reflex has demonstrated significant market fit, powering over 1 million applications and securing 28,000+ GitHub stars. Currently, 30% of Fortune 500 companies utilize the platform for internal tools and data-driven applications. Having recently raised a new round of funding, the company is positioned for rapid growth.

**Team and Culture:**
The founding team consists of experienced open-source maintainers, IOI medalists, and former members of dev-tool unicorns. They aim to solve the problem of fragmented enterprise stacks by offering solid, reusable abstractions and AI-driven workflows that enable single-click deployments.

The company is seeking passionate engineers to join their 10-person team in San Francisco to help replace traditional organizational bottlenecks with their streamlined development lifecycle.
chinese_title: Reflex (YC W23) 招聘 Python 软件工程师
chinese_summary:
总部位于旧金山的初创公司 Reflex (YC W23) 正在招聘软件工程师，以扩展其面向关键业务企业应用的“操作系统”。该公司提供一个统一的端到端平台，将开源框架与集成基础设施相结合，使团队无需专门的 DevOps 或平台团队即可构建、部署和管理应用。

**关键职位与薪酬：**
*   **增长软件工程师 (Growth Software Engineer)：** 12万–19万美元 | 0.10%–0.50% 股权（欢迎应届生）
*   **通用软件工程师 (Generalist Software Engineer)：** 12万–18万美元 | 0.10%–0.30% 股权（欢迎应届生）
*   **首席基础架构软件工程师 (Lead Infra Software Engineer)：** 13万–20万美元 | 0.15%–0.50% 股权（3 年以上经验）

**公司现状与市场地位：**
Reflex 已展现出显著的市场契合度，支持超过 100 万个应用，并在 GitHub 上获得 28,000 多个 Star。目前，30% 的《财富》500 强企业使用该平台开发内部工具和数据驱动型应用。公司近期完成了一轮新融资，正处于快速增长阶段。

**团队与文化：**
创始团队由经验丰富的开源维护者、国际信息学奥林匹克竞赛 (IOI) 奖牌得主以及前开发者工具独角兽成员组成。他们致力于通过提供稳健的可重用抽象和支持一键部署的 AI 驱动工作流，解决企业技术栈碎片化的问题。

公司目前正在寻找充满激情的工程师加入其位于旧金山的 10 人团队，共同利用其精简的开发生命周期来消除传统的组织瓶颈。

title: Felix "fx" Lindner has died
summary:
Felix “FX” Lindner, the founder and owner of Recurity Labs and a highly respected figure in the global security community, passed away on March 1, 2026. The announcement was made on March 2 by Nico Lindner and the Recurity Labs team.

Felix was a pivotal leader known for his technical excellence, mentorship, and commitment to ethical security practices. He built Recurity Labs on a foundation of curiosity, discipline, and honesty, prioritizing real-world impact and careful analysis over industry hype. He is remembered by colleagues and collaborators as a teacher and "sparring partner" who viewed security as a human-centric endeavor.

Regarding the company’s future, the team confirmed that Recurity Labs will continue its operations. This decision honors Felix’s express wish that the firm carry forward his legacy of professional rigor, integrity, and deep technical work. 

The team is currently collecting messages, memories, and condolences via email at **farewell@recurity-labs.com** to be shared with Felix’s family and the Recurity Labs staff.
chinese_title: Felix "fx" Lindner 逝世
chinese_summary:
Recurity Labs 创始人兼所有者、全球安全界备受推崇的知名人士 Felix “FX” Lindner 于 2026 年 3 月 1 日逝世。Nico Lindner 与 Recurity Labs 团队于 3 月 2 日发布了这一讣告。

Felix 是一位举足轻重的领导者，以其卓越的技术造诣、导师精神以及对道德安全实践的坚守而闻名。他在好奇心、自律和诚实的基础上创立了 Recurity Labs，始终坚持将实际影响和严谨分析置于行业炒作之上。在同事和合作伙伴的记忆中，他既是一位老师，也是一位“陪练”，始终将安全视为一项以人为本的事业。

关于公司的未来，团队确认 Recurity Labs 将继续运营。这一决定旨在遵循 Felix 的明确遗愿，即公司应继续传承他在专业严谨、诚信和深耕技术方面的精神遗产。

团队目前正通过电子邮件 **farewell@recurity-labs.com** 收集留言、回忆和悼词，并将其转达给 Felix 的家人及 Recurity Labs 全体员工。
